Strategic Compliance: Navigating Document Legalization for the China-Vietnam Corridor in 2026

Vietnam's accession to the Apostille Convention and the new Decree 219/2025/ND-CP reshape the document compliance landscape. Here's what HR teams need to know.

Process Optimization
